followup_template.name: followup_template
followup_template.default: 'Hi {{client_first_name}} — thanks again for choosing me. If you need anything else, just reply here.'

payment_reminder_template.name: payment_reminder_template
payment_reminder_template.default: 'Hi {{client_first_name}} — quick note: the invoice for {{job_title}} is still open. No rush—sharing here in case it got buried: {{invoice_link}}'

confirmation_template.name: confirmation_template
confirmation_template.default: 'Hi {{client_first_name}} — just confirming we''re set for {{job_date}} at {{job_time}}. Reply YES to confirm, or let me know if anything changes.'
